ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Change playback speed multiplier (ex. 0.5 = 0.5x playback speed (50% speed)). Default = 1.0
ast.target: 更改播放速度倍数（例如 0.5 = 0.5x 播放速度（50% 速度））。默认值 = 1.0

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Toggle notices for processing status and errors.
ast.target: 切换处理状态和错误的通知。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Toggle playback button in the status bar.
ast.target: 切换状态栏中的播放按钮。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Hide the floating playback control popover during audio playback.
ast.target: 在音频播放期间隐藏浮动播放控制弹出层。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Keep playback controls open after audio finishes to allow replaying.
ast.target: 音频结束后保持播放控制打开，以便重播。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable the playback queue functionality including queue manager and queue-related commands.
ast.target: 启用播放队列功能，包括队列管理器和队列相关命令。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically pause playback when Obsidian loses focus and resume when it regains focus.
ast.target: 当 Obsidian 失去焦点时自动暂停播放，重新获得焦点时继续播放。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable option to select "Generate MP3" in the file and editor menus.
ast.target: 在文件和编辑器菜单中启用选择“生成 MP3”的选项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Specify the folder to save generated MP3 files.
ast.target: 指定保存生成的 MP3 文件的文件夹。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable access to experimental features that may not be fully stable. These features are gated behind this toggle for safety.
ast.target: 启用可能不够稳定的实验性功能访问。为安全起见，这些功能受此开关控制。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show fewer notification popups on mobile devices to reduce screen clutter. Disable this for more verbose feedback.
ast.target: 在移动设备上显示更少的通知弹窗以减少屏幕杂乱。禁用此项可获得更详细的反馈。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Text to replace ">" symbols with (e.g., " greater than ", " maior que ")
ast.target: 用于替换“>”符号的文本（例如：“ greater than ”、“ maior que ”）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Text to replace "<" symbols with (e.g., " less than ", " menor que ")
ast.target: 用于替换“<”符号的文本（例如：“ less than ”、“ menor que ”）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Text to replace ">=" symbols with (e.g., " greater than or equal to ")
ast.target: 用于替换“>=”符号的文本（例如：“ greater than or equal to ”）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Text to replace "<=" symbols with (e.g., " less than or equal to ")
ast.target: 用于替换 "<=" 符号的文本（例如 " 小于或等于 "）

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 窗口失去焦点时自动暂停

ast.name: setTitle
ast.target: 将选中内容添加到队列
